What We Offer

WE BUILD
CAREERS

01
Artist Development

From brand identity to stage presence, we build artists from the ground up with long-term vision and authentic storytelling.

02
Music Production

In-house production support, studio coordination, and creative direction to help artists realize their sonic vision.

03
Booking & Touring

Strategic event placement, promoter relationships, and tour management to get your name in the right rooms.

04
Music Distribution

Digital distribution across all major platforms with royalty tracking and transparent reporting.

05
Brand & Marketing

Social media strategy, press campaigns, and visual identity systems built to cut through the noise.

06
Sync Licensing

Placing music in film, TV, games, and ads — creating passive revenue streams that compound over time.

Our Story

BUILT
DIFFERENT

Indie Guerrilla Studios was founded on a simple belief: great music doesn't need a major label's permission. We exist to give independent artists the infrastructure, resources, and strategy that used to be locked behind industry gatekeepers.

With a foundation in both technology and music business, we operate at the intersection of creative vision and strategic execution.

Empower independent artists to own their craft, their masters, and their future.

Our Mission

Transparency in royalties. Honesty in strategy. Relentlessness in execution.

Our Promise

Get In Touch

READY TO
MAKE MOVES?

Whether you're an artist looking for a home or a promoter looking to book — let's talk.
